name: Wireless Headphones

description: Compact waterproof speaker with rich bass and 12-hour playtime. Perfect for outdoor adventures.

description: Fitness tracking smartwatch with heart rate monitor, GPS, and always-on display.

description: Classic medium-wash denim jacket with a modern slim fit. Made from durable cotton blend.

description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper.

description: Comprehensive guide to modern Swift development covering concurrency, SwiftUI, and best practices.

description: Timeless reference on software design patterns with practical examples and real-world applications.
